ValidationRule.description: Values in Reopening reason cannot be erased manually.
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND(NOT($User.Bypass_Validation_Rules__c), CONTAINS($Label.CCCMRetrieveRecordTypeIds, RecordType.DeveloperName), NOT(ISBLANK(TEXT(Status))), ISCHANGED(Reopening_Reason__c), ISPICKVAL(PRIORVALUE(Reopening_Reason__c), 'Case Not Solved'), ISBLANK(TEXT(Reopening_Reason__c)))
ValidationRule.errorMessage: You can’t erase value in Reopening reason field, please create a child case if it is a new request
